profile.name: HARISH ROHITH
profile.headline: Technical Architect | AI & IoT Specialist | Founder of CoLearn
profile.subheadline: B.Sc. Computer Technology student focused on high-performance scalable systems, LLM engineering, real-time platforms, and IoT telemetry.
profile.bio: Technical Architect and B.Sc. student specializing in high-performance scalable systems. National-level hackathon winner with expertise in LLM engineering, real-time WebSockets, and IoT telemetry. Developed a 4B+ parameter custom LLM and architected Bun and Elysia systems for sub-millisecond latency, while building Green AI solutions focused on sustainability and cost efficiency.
profile.statsSummary: Architecting AI, IoT, and high-concurrency full-stack systems with a strong bias toward performance, research, product execution, and green efficiency.

settings.siteDescription: Portfolio of Harish Rohith — Technical Architect, AI & IoT Specialist

projects.title: SkipQ | Decentralized Queue Management
projects.summary: Built a latency-free token tracking system using Firebase Realtime Database and real-time analytics.
projects.description: Designed a decentralized queue platform that reduced wait times through instant token visibility and live analytics.
projects.stack: Firebase Realtime Database, Analytics, Full Stack

projects.title: R-Choice
projects.summary: A full-stack internship and placement management platform unifying students, faculty, coordinators, and company partners into an 8-role aware, streamlined digital pipeline.
projects.description: Developed a production-ready institutional platform for Rathinam College of Arts and Science. Built with a 6-tier automated approval pipeline that routes internship requests through institutional hierarchy. Designed real-time dashboards with animated charts, a self-service company portal for job postings, and robust enterprise-grade security including rate limiting, CSRF protection, and audit logs.
projects.stack: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL (Neon)
projects.impact: Replaced manual spreadsheets with a unified system managing internship approvals for 8 distinct roles.

projects.title: Devs Recipe
projects.summary: A modern, comprehensive developer resource hub designed as an interactive cookbook for developers, offering high-quality script generators, library comparisons, quick templates, and visual project structures.
projects.description: Engineered as an interactive, high-performance resource hub with TypeScript and Next.js. Features automated script generators to eliminate mundane coding tasks, side-by-side library comparison matrices to guide technology stack decisions, ready-to-use template snippets for common UI and logic patterns, and interactive visual structures to conceptualize complex software architectures with built-in productivity keyboard shortcuts.
projects.stack: TypeScript, Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, Keyboard Shortcuts
projects.impact: Automated coding tasks and streamlined technology selection workflows with script generators.

projects.title: TN-GridSense
projects.summary: Tamil Nadu distributed smart pole telemetry and predictive fault management system monitoring the electrical distribution grid at pole-level granularity.
projects.description: Engineered a state-scale real-time monitoring platform for electrical grids. Deployed intelligent edge nodes on distribution poles using ESP32 microcontrollers to capture 5-second interval NTP-synced telemetry packets containing voltage, current, temperature, and health scores. Architected a sub-millisecond ingestion backend on Bun and ElysiaJS, processing concurrent pole telemetry, evaluating health scores, estimating AT&C loss deviations, and broadcasting real-time metrics via WebSockets to a responsive 3-tier mapping dashboard.
projects.stack: ESP32, Bun.js, ElysiaJS, LoRa SX1278, WebSockets, Chart.js
projects.impact: Monitors pole-level stress conditions and forecasts transformer failures to proactively prevent outages across regional sectors.

projects.title: NeerAI
projects.summary: Intelligent state-scale water infrastructure and telemetry platform combining Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), IoT Edge computing, and local Cognitive AI.
projects.description: Architected a 3-tier municipal water monitoring network utilizing TinyML (Random Forests) on ESP32 microcontrollers for real-time edge anomaly filtering. Integrated fluid dynamics (Bernoulli and Hazen-Williams equations) with deep learning inside a Physics-Informed Neural Network (PINN) to localize leaks using Negative Pressure Wave equations. Fine-tuned NeerLLM—a domain-specific 3B parameter local LLM—on IS 10500 standards, WHO guidelines, and 2.4 million network anomaly sequences for automated cognitive diagnostics.
projects.stack: Next.js 15, TinyML (ESP32), PINN (Deep Learning), Bun.js, ElysiaJS, NeerLLM (3B LLM)
projects.impact: Pinpoints pipe leaks, predicts water pump degradation/RUL with LSTMs, and optimizes municipality pump energy grids.

projects.title: Custom LLM & Decision Intelligence Dashboard
projects.summary: Architected and trained a 4B+ parameter LLM using linear regression and Tx-ITx architecture on 100K+ curated data points.
projects.description: Secured a 1-year research MoU with the Innovation Cell by building a decision intelligence stack around a custom model training pipeline.
projects.stack: Custom LLM, Tx-ITx, Python, Decision Intelligence
projects.impact: Secured a 1-year research MoU with the Innovation Cell.

projects.description: Led Team Monarchs in building a real-time campus operating system focused on navigation, permissions, and live movement data.

projects.title: LibreFlow | Next-Gen Library Management System

projects.description: Engineered LibreFlow as a fast-moving solo challenge project with live tracking, smarter content circulation, and product-first workflow clarity.
projects.stack: Full Stack, Library Systems, Live Tracking
projects.impact: Engineered a timed solo build with live tracking and knowledge-sharing workflows.

projects.title: Cense-Ops

projects.description: Developed a lightweight Python operations framework to automate telemetry acquisition, log collection, and predictive health checks across ESP32 and Raspberry Pi sensor nodes.
projects.impact: Automated predictive health checks for 50+ IoT node arrays.

projects.description: Designed and built an inclusive health tracking platform featuring personalized wellness insights, cycle prediction tools, and localized community support forums.
projects.impact: Delivered an inclusive, high-privacy health portal with personalized cycle predictions.

projects.description: Engineered a fast, content-first educational catalog landing page and digital bookstore interface featuring structured reading guides and modular textbook navigation.
projects.impact: Streamlined book exploration and digital textbook navigation.

projects.impact: Engineered a real-time web workspace dashboard for modular task distribution.
